name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M61276 [Premium Enhanced Version]. Leather is authentic factory Italian Grade A leather. Focuses on quality, all-steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, and Grade A high-quality output. Fully upgraded again. Photos match the product. Includes full packaging set. Size: 21*12*3CM
